initial_directives: Fix and resubmit the GitHub bounty PR for UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters issue #915 ($200 bounty). Previous PR #7578 was CLOSED because changes didn't fully resolve the issue. Required: fork repo, create branch, make changes, open NEW pull request. Required fixes for PriceOracle.sol: (1) validation after latestRoundData: answeredInRound >= roundId for round completeness, (2) require(price > 0, "Invalid price") to reject negative/zero prices — MUST REVERT not return false, (3) staleness check with MAX_STALENESS = 3600, (4) fallback oracle when primary returns stale data, (5) emit StalePrice event when falling back. Acceptance criteria: stale prices trigger fallback; zero/negative REVERT; incomplete rounds rejected; StalePrice event with primary last update timestamp; both oracles stale reverts; MAX_STALENESS owner-configurable; tests mock Chainlink for valid/stale/negative/incomplete/both-stale; .generation_meta.json with agent/initial_directives/date; PR title MUST start with "key1989han [ Crypto ]". Why #7578 rejected: zero/negative returned (false,0) instead of REVERT; NO TESTS; missing .generation_meta.json; wrong PR title. CONTRIBUTING: one issue per PR, Conventional Commits, code changes only, tests required, match style.
